case_title: VILLON, PLINIO et al vs. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLON, PLINIO BAZAN, NILTON AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES  1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-18-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-19-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-28-1994
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO PLAINTIFF BAZAN, NILTON
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-18-1994, CASE ORDERED TO ARBITRATION ON JAN-17-1995 PURSUANT TO CCP 1141.11(D) NOTICE SENT BY COURT

ADDED TO STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-02-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04
NOTICE OF ARBITRATION HEARING SET FOR 3/22/95

AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, ENTER JUDGMENT ON MAY-05-1995
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON 4/3/95 AS TO AWARD OF ARBITRATOR ON EDUARDO SANDOVAL, ESQ. MARGARET BAUMGARTNER, ESQ. AND ARBITRATION ADMINISTRATOR S.F. MUNICIPAL COURT, FILED.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING
ARBITRATOR'S AWARD SENT TO DEFAULT SECTION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO DEFENDANT
